meaning: n.古时攻打敌船所用的燃料剂,磷火,鬼火,散布(或传播)极快的事物
examples: A wildfire can destroy everything in its way.
On May 1st, 2016, in Alberta, Canada, a wildfire destroyed an area of nearly 700 square miles.
These stories are spreading like wildfire through the city.
The National Weather Service has issued warnings of high chances of wildfire activity in nine states, including Colorado.
More water was dropped from the air onto a wildfire at Kishorn in the west Highlands.
